title: Distributed Tracing Propagation Flow
interaction_flow: --- INBOUND (extraction) ---
UpstreamService → ServerIntegration: HTTP request with tracing headers (x-datadog-*, traceparent, tracestate, baggage)
ServerIntegration → ServerIntegration: extract headers from request into map
ServerIntegration → DDTraceExtension: consume_distributed_tracing_headers(array|callable|null)
Note: callable form used in Swoole: fn($key) => $headers[$key] ?? null
Note: null form reads directly from $_SERVER superglobal (auto-instrumentation)
DDTraceExtension → DDTraceExtension: parse x-datadog-trace-id, x-datadog-parent-id, x-datadog-sampling-priority, x-datadog-origin, x-datadog-tags, traceparent, tracestate, baggage
DDTraceExtension → DDTraceExtension: set internal distributed trace context
--- OPENTRACING PROPAGATOR (extract path) ---
Propagator::extract(carrier) → DDTraceExtension: consume_distributed_tracing_headers equivalent
DDTraceExtension → SpanContext: new SpanContext(traceId, spanId, parentId, baggageItems, isDistributedTracingActivationContext=true)
SpanContext → SpanContext: createAsChild(parentContext) — if isDistributedTracingActivationContext && no active_span
SpanContext → DDTraceExtension: set_distributed_tracing_context(traceId, spanId, origin)
SpanContext → DDTraceExtension: start_span() — starts new span, peeks active span id
SpanContext → SpanContext: setPropagatedPrioritySampling(parentContext.getPropagatedPrioritySampling())
--- CONTEXT INSPECTION ---
ApplicationCode → DDTraceExtension: current_context()
DDTraceExtension → ApplicationCode: return array{trace_id, span_id, version, env}
--- OUTBOUND (injection) ---
ApplicationCode → ClientIntegration: HTTP client call (e.g. GuzzleHttp\Client::transfer)
ClientIntegration → DDTraceExtension: ddtrace_config_distributed_tracing_enabled() check
ClientIntegration → DDTraceExtension: generate_distributed_tracing_headers(inject_styles_array|null)
DDTraceExtension → ClientIntegration: return headers array (x-datadog-trace-id, x-datadog-parent-id, x-datadog-sampling-priority, x-datadog-origin, x-datadog-tags, traceparent, tracestate, baggage)
ClientIntegration → ClientIntegration: withHeader(name, value) for each dtHeader not already present
ClientIntegration → DownstreamService: HTTP request with injected tracing headers
--- OPENTRACING PROPAGATOR (inject path) ---
Propagator::inject(SpanContext, carrier) → DDTraceExtension: generate_distributed_tracing_headers equivalent
DDTraceExtension → Propagator: headers written into carrier map
--- MANUAL CONTEXT RESET ---
ApplicationCode → DDTraceExtension: set_distributed_tracing_context('0', '0') — resets distributed context
key_relationships: Propagator (interface) depends_on SpanContextInterface — inject(SpanContextInterface, carrier) / extract(carrier): SpanContextInterface
SpanContext::createAsChild depends_on set_distributed_tracing_context, start_span, active_span (DDTrace extension functions)
SwooleIntegration uses consume_distributed_tracing_headers (callable form for Swoole request headers)
GuzzleIntegration uses generate_distributed_tracing_headers (injects into PSR-7 RequestInterface)

function_signatures.generate_distributed_tracing_headers: function generate_distributed_tracing_headers(array|null $inject = null): array{x-datadog-sampling-priority, x-datadog-origin, x-datadog-trace-id, x-datadog-parent-id, traceparent, tracestate}
function_signatures.set_distributed_tracing_context: function set_distributed_tracing_context(string $traceId, string $parentId, ?string $origin = null, array|string|null $propagated_tags = null): bool
function_signatures.current_context: function current_context(): array{trace_id: string, span_id: string, version: string, env: string}
function_signatures.SpanContext.createAsChild: public static function createAsChild(SpanContextInterface $parentContext, $startTime = null): SpanContext
function_signatures.SpanContext.createAsRoot: public static function createAsRoot(array $baggageItems = [], $startTime = null): SpanContext

spancontext_fields: isDistributedTracingActivationContext (bool) — true when SpanContext came from incoming distributed headers
important_notes: Two propagation paths exist: (1) Native DDTrace functions — consume_distributed_tracing_headers/generate_distributed_tracing_headers used by framework integrations (Swoole, Guzzle, RoadRunner, Kafka, AMQP, Laravel Queue, Ratchet, FrankenPHP); (2) OpenTracing Propagator interface — inject/extract wrapping the same underlying mechanism. set_distributed_tracing_context('0','0') resets context. isDistributedTracingActivationContext flag controls whether createAsChild calls set_distributed_tracing_context before starting a new span. Header style selection controlled by DD_TRACE_PROPAGATION_STYLE_INJECT env var. try_drop_span() will FAIL if generate_distributed_tracing_headers() was already called on that span.
